headline: Up a rook, mated in the center — and an 11-game night block
note: 18 rapid games since the last briefing: 7W-11L, rating 705 to 677. The one to study: vs unknowngirl181910 you won a clean knight with 15.Bxc6 and stood +6 — but the king never castled, 18...Qb4+ forced Kd1, and 24.Qxc7 grabbed a pawn while Qd3# was the only reply that mattered. Seven allowed mate-in-1s today against a 60/60 mate-in-1 puzzle record — the scan exists, it just isn't being run on real moves, especially king moves and captures. Eleven of the 18 games came between 21:54 and 00:28 and went 3W-8L; the schedule lost more points than the openings did. Bright spots: 2W-0L vs 1.d4 as Black (the KID work is landing), and mating wins vs genglish71 and bhkspurs. New rule: three games max, none after 22:00, and before every king move or capture ask one question — what is their next check or capture?

tasks.title: Stop the free-piece tithe
tasks.detail: 15 pieces hung in 18 games — 19.Qxh7+ vs TempestumEffector gave a whole queen for a pawn, and sub-15-move losses to HicoshOP (10 moves) and Jonat5957 (13) were single hangs.

tasks.title: Convert +5 to checkmate
tasks.detail: You were +6 vs unknowngirl181910 and got mated; K+R mate is still 0-for-8 in drills. One conversion run to mate, asking 'what is their next check?' every move.

tasks.title: One Caro-Kann course unit
tasks.detail: 2W-4L with the Caro today — the 2.Nc3 and Exchange lines (keroRoma, callmetaide, Tuco00) keep producing positions you drift in.

tasks.title: Three games max — none after 22:00
tasks.detail: The 21:54-00:28 block went 3W-8L and cost 30 rating points; castle by move 8 in all three.
